goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0013 (M4 PR-A verifier) verified PASS on 2026-05-30. PR #159 squash-merged into main as commit ed48633 — feat(executionstate): land M4 PR-A — internal/executionstate model + writer + resolver. internal/executionstate is leaf-clean (no reach into cmd/orun, internal/state, internal/runner, internal/runbundle); revision.UpdateLatestExecutionSummary now has its first real callers (CreateExecution.finalizeExecution + MarkTerminal) and the CAS + idempotent-short-circuit dance is exercised under -race.

Coverage on PR #159 final: internal/executionstate=90.0% (exact floor, gate ≥90%); internal/revision=90.4% (M3 floor preserved); internal/statestore=95.4% (M2 floor preserved). All quality gates green: go build/vet, go test -race ./..., make test-state-redesign. Both required CI checks SUCCESS at log level (CI / Orun Plan run 26675724704; Harness dry-run guard run 26675724720).

Verifier adjudications (accepted with Risk Notes; no spec proposal filed): (1) Manifest required for UpdateLatestExecutionSummary — implementer surfaces ErrNotFound loudly when called against a revision missing manifest.json; conservative-on-unknowns posture matches revision/writer.go style; carry-forward to M5 to ensure WriteRevision+WriteManifest precede CreateExecution. (2) Legacy-execution literal defaults (triggerKey=system.migrated, Reason=migration, Status=completed default) — defensible read of compat §4 but not strictly normative; pin these literals when migration command lands in M5/Phase 2. (3) R-002 ExecID shape (gh-{run_id}-{attempt}-{sha}) round-trips identity through SanitizeExecID — runbundle compat closed.

M4 PR-A milestone HALF-CLOSED with this merge. Next = **Task 0014 = M4 PR-B implementer** per implementation-plan.md §M4. Scope: internal/executionstate/bridge.go (Bridge{Store, LegacyRoot, MirrorMode} + MirrorRunnerOutput) with hardlink-with-copy-fallback, EXDEV-injection test seam, bridge-mirror-failed event emission, idempotent re-mirror. Coverage floor stays ≥90% (PR-B should organically lift it above the exact floor PR-A landed at). Production runner wiring is OUT OF SCOPE — M5 owns CLI rewire. M4 fully closes when Task 0015 (PR-B verifier) PASSes.

Risk-Notes carried into M4 PR-B: (a) coverage at exact 90.0% floor — small refactors that delete a covered branch could trip the gate; PR-B is expected to lift the floor. (b) Manifest-required-for-summary contract pinning deferred to M5/Phase 2 (not blocking PR-B). (c) Legacy-execution literal-defaults normativity in compat §4 deferred to migration-command landing. (d) Property test TestNextExecutionKey_MonotonicityUnderConcurrency is ~30s under -race — acceptable now but flag for -short skip if it grows.

Persistent local environment quirk (NOT a regression): kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml occasionally fails on composition-cache resolution. Reproduces sporadically since Task 0001 on main and PR branches. CI passes the same invocation; CI is authoritative.
